NAVAREA XIX 43/21

1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 210630 UTC APR 21
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

73-34.6N 022-55.1E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
72-27.0N 020-09.0E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
65-07.1N 006-40.3E  TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE

NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 37/21
